title: Better End Cities for BetterEnd
description: This makes end cities look better, using blocks from the BetterEnd mod
body:
With this mod as well as the BetterEnd Fabric mod installed, the end cities that generate will be much more intricate in design and will include the wood types and some decorations from the BetterEnd mod.

The end cities will also include more loot as each loot room has more chests.

 

This mod is a perfect addition to any modpack that includes BetterEnd Fabric.




For compatibility with "Lootr", You must download and use this datapack: [https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/lootr-compatibility-pack-for-betterend-fabric/](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/lootr-compatibility-pack-for-betterend-fabric/)
